api_payload.title: CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform GetDBDataEx.jsp sql injection

detection_pack.sigma:
title: APEX - CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge — SQL Injection
id: apex-sqli-d9987526
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects SQL injection exploitation attempts for CVE-2026-9465. Covers classic, blind, time-based, error-based, and UNION-based SQLi attack patterns in web request parameters and URI queries.
  Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v161.0
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-9465
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/05/25
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.t1190
    - attack.t1059.001
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  sqli_union_based:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - 'UNION+SELECT'
      - 'UNION%20SELECT'
      - 'UNION/**/SELECT'
      - 'UNION%0ASELECT'
  sqli_boolean_based:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - "' OR '1'='1"
      - "' OR 1=1--"
      - "1' AND 1=1--"
      - "' OR 'x'='x"
      - "admin'--"
      - "1' OR '1'='1"
  sqli_time_based:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - 'SLEEP('
      - 'WAITFOR DELAY'
      - 'BENCHMARK('
      - 'pg_sleep('
      - '; SELECT SLEEP'
  sqli_stacked_queries:
    cs-uri-query|contains:
      - '; DROP TABLE'
      - '; INSERT INTO'
      - '; UPDATE '
      - '; EXEC '
      - 'xp_cmdshell'
      - 'EXEC(CHAR'
  condition: sqli_union_based or sqli_boolean_based or sqli_time_based or sqli_stacked_queries
falsepositives:
  - URL-encoded legitimate content containing SQL-like keywords
  - Security scanner automated SQL injection testing
  - UNION appearing in legitimate application query strings
level: high
detection_pack.spl:
| comment "CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge | CVE-2026-9465 | APEX v161.0"

| comment "SQLi detection from web logs"
index=web earliest=-24h
| eval is_sqli = if(match(uri_query, "UNION.{0,10}SELECT|' OR '1'='1|SLEEP\(|xp_cmdshell"), 1, 0)
| where is_sqli=1
index=network OR index=proxy earliest=-24h
| eval threat_match = if(match(_raw, "(?i)(https://vulners\.com/cvelist/CVELIST:CVE\-2026\-9465\?utm_source=rss\&utm_medium=rss\&utm_campaign=rss\|cstecgi\.cgi\|getdbdataex\.jsp\|skills\-loader\.ts)"), 1, 0)
| where threat_match=1
| eval rule="APEX-CVE-2026-9465", severity="HIGH"
| stats count min(_time) as first_seen max(_time) as last_seen by src_ip, dest_host, rule, severity
| convert timeformat="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" ctime(first_seen) ctime(last_seen)
| sort -count
detection_pack.yara:
rule APEX_CVE_2026_9465__SQLI {
    meta:
        description   = "APEX detection: CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform GetDBDataEx."
        cve           = "CVE-2026-9465"
        vuln_class    = "SQLI"
        author        = "CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v161.0"
        date          = "2026-05-25"
        reference     = "https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com"
        severity      = "high"
        mitre_attack  = "T1190.001, T1190, T1059"
    strings:
        $sqli_union = "UNION SELECT" ascii wide nocase  // SQLi UNION-based
        $sqli_sleep = "SLEEP(" ascii wide nocase  // SQLi time-based
        $sqli_xp = "xp_cmdshell" ascii wide nocase  // SQLi stacked MSSQL
        $sqli_blind = "1=1--" ascii wide nocase  // SQLi boolean blind
        $ioc_0 = "https://vulners.com/cvelist/CVELIST:CVE-2026-9465?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: https://vulners.com/cvelist/CVELIST:CVE-
        $ioc_1 = "cstecgi.cgi" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: cstecgi.cgi
        $ioc_2 = "getdbdataex.jsp" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: getdbdataex.jsp
        $ioc_3 = "skills-loader.ts" ascii wide nocase  // IOC: skills-loader.ts
    condition:
        any of ($ioc_*)
}
detection_pack.elastic_lucene:
// Elastic Lucene: intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0
("<indicator>") AND @timestamp:[now-30d TO now]
detection_pack.qradar_aql:
/* QRadar AQL: CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge | intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0 */
SELECT DATEFORMAT(devicetime,'YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS EventTime,
  sourceip, destinationip, username, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS Source,
  QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName, 'intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0' AS AdvisoryID
FROM events WHERE category ILIKE '%web%'
WHERE (TEXT SEARCH '<indicator>')
AND devicetime > (NOW() - 2592000)
ORDER BY devicetime DESC LIMIT 10000
START '30 days ago' STOP 'now'
detection_pack.chronicle_yaral:
// Chronicle YARA-L: CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge
rule apex_intel__7451f493ec173808c4bd26c {
  meta:
    description = "CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform GetDBDataEx.jsp sql in"
    author = "CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX"
    severity = "HIGH"
    attack_techniques = "TT1190 | TT1059.001"
  events:
  $e.metadata.event_type = "NETWORK_CONNECTION"
  condition:
    $e
}
detection_pack.crowdstrike:
// CrowdStrike NG-SIEM: CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge
#type=ProcessRollup2 | head 10000
| search (CommandHistory contains "<indicator>")
| eval hunt_id="intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0"
| stats count by HostName, FileName, CommandLine
detection_pack.sentinelone:
// SentinelOne Power Query: CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge
EventType = 'Process Creation' AND
(ProcessCmd Contains "<indicator>")
| columns SrcProcName, SrcProcCmdLine, AgentComputerName, SrcProcUser
detection_pack.falco:
- rule: APEX - CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge
  desc: intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0 - TT1190 | TT1059.001
  condition: spawned_process and (proc.cmdline contains "<indicator>")
  output: "APEX Alert: %proc.name %proc.cmdline"
  priority: HIGH
  tags: [apex, TT1190, TT1059.001]
detection_pack.osquery:
-- OSQuery: CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge | intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0
SELECT pid, name, cmdline, path, parent, uid
FROM processes
WHERE (cmdline LIKE '%indicator%');

retro_hunt.spl_splunk:
| comment "RETRO-HUNT: intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0 | CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge | Techniques: T1190 T1059 T1190.001"
index=* earliest=-90d latest=now
(
    ("<ip_indicator>")
    OR ("cstecgi.cgi")
    OR ("<hash_indicator>")
)
| eval hunt_advisory="intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0"
| eval hunt_techniques="T1190 T1059 T1190.001"
| eval hunt_ts=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| eval indicator_type=case(
    match(_raw, "(x.x.x.x"), "IP",
    match(_raw, "(cstecgi.cgi"), "Domain",
    match(_raw, "(hash"), "Hash",
    1==1, "Unknown"
  )
| stats count AS hits,
    min(_time) AS first_seen,
    max(_time) AS last_seen,
    dc(host) AS affected_hosts,
    values(sourcetype) AS sources
    BY hunt_advisory, indicator_type, host
| where hits > 0
| eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"),
       last_seen=strftime(last_seen,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| sort - hits
retro_hunt.qradar_aql:
/* RETRO-HUNT AQL: intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0 | Lookback: 90d */
SELECT
    DATEFORMAT(devicetime,'YYYY-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS EventTime,
    sourceip, destinationip, destinationhostname,
    username, "Application", "Event Category",
    LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS LogSource,
    QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName,
    'intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0' AS HuntAdvisoryID
FROM events
WHERE (
    destinationip IN ('<ip>')
    OR sourceip IN ('<ip>')
    OR destinationhostname IN ('cstecgi.cgi')
    OR LOOKUPHOSTNAME(destinationip) IN ('cstecgi.cgi')
)
AND devicetime > (NOW() - 7776000)
ORDER BY devicetime DESC
LIMIT 10000
START '90d ago'
STOP 'now'
retro_hunt.crowdstrike_eql:
/* RETRO-HUNT CrowdStrike Event Query: intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0 | Techniques: T1190, T1059, T1190.001 */
#type=ProcessRollup2 | head 1000
| eval hunt_id="intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0"
| search (sha256 = "<hash>") OR (DomainName = "cstecgi.cgi")
| stats count by HostName, FileName, CommandLine, UserSid, TimeStamp
| sort count desc
retro_hunt.generic_sql:
/* RETRO-HUNT Generic SQL: intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0 | Lookback: 90d */
/* Compatible with: Splunk Data Lake, Snowflake, BigQuery, Azure Data Explorer */
SELECT
    event_timestamp,
    host_name,
    source_ip,
    destination_ip,
    destination_domain,
    file_hash_sha256,
    process_name,
    process_command_line,
    user_name,
    'intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0' AS hunt_advisory_id
FROM security_events
WHERE event_timestamp > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND (
    destination_ip IN ('<ip>')
    OR source_ip IN ('<ip>')
    OR destination_domain IN ('cstecgi.cgi')
    OR file_hash_sha256 IN ('<hash>')
  )
ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50000;

optional_telemetry.name: WAF (Web Application Firewall) Logs
optional_telemetry.agent_required: WAF (AWS WAF, Azure Front Door, Cloudflare)

collection_gaps: MISSING (free): IIS/Apache/Nginx Access Logs — Web server log forwarding (Filebeat/NXLog)

normalized_rules.kql:
// Sentinel Rule: CVE-2026-9465 Tiandy Easy7 Integrated Management Platform Ge | intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0 | Techniques: TT1190 | TT1059.001
// Severity: high
DeviceNetworkEvents | union W3CIISLog
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("<indicator>")
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcessCommandLine
| extend AdvisoryID="intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0", Techniques="TT1190 | TT1059.001"
normalized_rules.spl:

index=web sourcetype=access_combined earliest=-30d latest=now
("<indicator>")
| eval hunt_id="intel--7451f493ec173808c4bd26c0" | eval severity="high"
| stats count AS hits, min(_time) AS first, max(_time) AS last,
    dc(host) AS hosts BY CommandLine, host, sourcetype
| where hits > 0 | sort - hits
